Critic Markup — addition
.
{++addition++}
.
<p><ins>addition</ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — deletion
.
{--deletion--}
.
<p><del>deletion</del></p>
.

Critic Markup — substitution
.
{~~old text~>new text~~}
.
<p><del>old text</del><ins>new text</ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — highlight
.
{==highlighted text==}
.
<p><mark>highlighted text</mark></p>
.

Critic Markup — comment
.
{>>This is a comment<<}
.
<p><span style="display:none">This is a comment</span></p>
.

Critic Markup — all types in one paragraph
.
{++added++} and {--removed--} and {~~old~>new~~} and {==marked==} and {>>hidden<<}
.
<p><ins>added</ins> and <del>removed</del> and <del>old</del><ins>new</ins> and <mark>marked</mark> and <span style="display:none">hidden</span></p>
.

Critic Markup — empty content is not valid
.
{++++}

{----}

{~~~~}

{====}

{>><<}
.
<p>{++++}</p>
<p>{----}</p>
<p>{~~~~}</p>
<p>{====}</p>
<p>{&gt;&gt;&lt;&lt;}</p>
.

Critic Markup — multi-line content
.
{++line one
line two++}
.
<p><ins>line one
line two</ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — no closing marker
.
{++unclosed

{--also unclosed
.
<p>{++unclosed</p>
<p>{--also unclosed</p>
.

Critic Markup — with special characters
.
{++<strong>bold</strong>++}
.
<p><ins>&lt;strong&gt;bold&lt;/strong&gt;</ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — HTML entities in content
.
{++a &amp; b++}
.
<p><ins>a &amp;amp; b</ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — substitution with empty old text
.
{~~>new~~}
.
<p>{<s>&gt;new</s>}</p>
.

Critic Markup — substitution with empty new text
.
{~~old~>~~}
.
<p><del>old</del><ins></ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — adjacent critic markups
.
{++a++}{--b--}
.
<p><ins>a</ins><del>b</del></p>
.

Critic Markup — nested curly braces in content
.
{++text with {braces}++}
.
<p><ins>text with {braces}</ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — critic in emphasis
.
*{++added++}*
.
<p><em><ins>added</ins></em></p>
.

Critic Markup — critic in strong
.
**{--removed--}**
.
<p><strong><del>removed</del></strong></p>
.

Critic Markup — not triggered without enable
.
{++addition++}
.
<p>{++addition++}</p>
.

Critic Markup — mixed with regular text
.
Before {++inserted++} middle {--deleted--} after.
.
<p>Before <ins>inserted</ins> middle <del>deleted</del> after.</p>
.

Critic Markup — substitution with special chars
.
{~~foo & bar~>baz < qux~~}
.
<p><del>foo &amp; bar</del><ins>baz &lt; qux</ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — multi-line substitution
.
{~~old line 1
old line 2~>new line 1
new line 2~~}
.
<p><del>old line 1
old line 2</del><ins>new line 1
new line 2</ins></p>
.

Critic Markup — incomplete opening
.
{+not critic+}

{-not critic-}
.
<p>{+not critic+}</p>
<p>{-not critic-}</p>
.
